#  Resource Tracking And Unit Quantity Based Budget Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Enable Task Codes 
###  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company level Admin tool.
  2. Under 'Tool Settings', select **Timesheets** or **My Time.**
  3. Click the **Task Codes** tab.
  4. Take one of the following actions:
     * Move the toggle to the **ON** ![Icon Toggle On](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5432baecee81bc2745e77688cd124644/7b30429a4c1524f8ad61245b0caddc16/icon-toggle-on.png?fm=webp&h=16) position to enable task codes.
     * Move the toggle to the **OFF** ![Icon Toggle Off](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0a9e48ba0a19424d1d9dc8949193b38c/8d8bf12f505a1561d3c9d37ac95a6a30/icon-toggle-off.png?fm=webp&h=18) position to disable task codes.
